data:
3 suppliers were contacted.

CompuTech Distribution offered RTX 3090 at €900 with 10-day delivery and 1-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.
Enterprise Compute Solutions offered RTX 4080 at €750 with 12-day delivery and 3-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.
RapidShip Components offered RTX 4070 at €620 with 2-day delivery and 1-year warranty. This offer passed all technical checks and stayed within budget.

Recommended supplier: RapidShip Components — RTX 4070 at €620, 2-day delivery.
Reason: Best balance of compatibility, price, delivery, warranty, and risk.
